products.name: CM234 Gimbal
products.descriptor: Next-generation gyro-stabilised EO/IR imaging system selected for ADF TUAS (Land 129 Phase 3)

evidence.snippet:
AVT Australia’s cutting-edge [CM234 Spitfire](/products/cm234) imaging system has been selected for incorporation into  the Australian Army’s new tactical unmanned aerial system (TUAS) for Land 129 Phase 3.
The CM234 is a next-generation gyro-stabilised imaging system that will deliver enhanced situational awareness in the field.

products.notes: Also known as "Spitfire"; selected for Australian Army Land 129 Phase 3 TUAS program.

products.name: CM102-MR Gimbal
products.descriptor: Marine-ruggedised EO/IR gyro-stabilised imaging system for maritime and ground platforms

evidence.snippet: AVT Australia is proud to announce the launch of the CM102-MR, an electro-optical (EO) and infrared (IR) gyro-stabilised imaging system built for maritime and ground-based environments.

products.notes: IP67-rated variant of CM102; weighs under 2.5 kg; supports USVs and ground platforms.

products.name: CM62 Family
products.descriptor: Family of gyro-stabilised ISR imaging gimbals with on-gimbal object recognition

evidence.snippet: AVT Australia provides VEXOS and field-upgradable firmware to ensure your mission success. Our software is designed with the operator in mind to ensure that it is easy-to-use and reliable for mission execution. Our CM62 gimbals also come with on-gimbal automated object recognition to reduce operator workload and increase mission autonomy.

products.name: On-Gimbal Automated Object Recognition
products.descriptor: Onboard automated object detection and recognition capability embedded in CM62 gimbals

evidence.snippet: AVT Australia provides VEXOS and field-upgradable firmware to ensure your mission success. Our software is designed with the operator in mind to ensure that it is easy-to-use and reliable for mission execution. products.notes: Standard feature on CM62 family gimbals; also noted as available on CM102-MR per resource-0015 line 28.
